summary: Backend-only testing of Excel and CSV export with per-drug colors and multi-drug readout support. All 29 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) Excel drug_fills array with 4 PatternFill objects matching DRUG_COLORS tints (F3E8FF, EDE9FE, E9D5FF, DDD6FE), (2) Excel Drug Perfusion section uses per-drug fill colors, (3) Excel Drug Readout section has single header with multiple drug blocks using per-drug colors, (4) CSV Drug Readout section outputs data for each enabled drug with drug name, (5) CSV per-drug readout uses correct per-drug settings (bfReadoutMinute, hrvReadoutMinute).
critical_code_review_comments: export_utils.py lines 1428-1433: drug_fills array correctly defined with 4 PatternFill objects matching DRUG_COLORS tints
export_utils.py lines 1559-1613: Drug Perfusion Excel section uses drug_fills[idx % len(drug_fills)] for per-drug coloring
export_utils.py lines 1700-1835: Drug Readout Excel section has single header with loops through enabled_drugs using per-drug fills
export_utils.py lines 1756-1770: Per-drug settings (bfReadoutMinute, hrvReadoutMinute) correctly read from perDrug dict for each drug
export_utils.py lines 2440-2552: CSV Drug Readout section outputs 'Drug, [drug_name]' row for each enabled drug with metrics
export_utils.py lines 2491-2505: CSV uses per-drug bfReadoutMinute and hrvReadoutMinute settings correctly
AnalysisPanel.js line 1048: Drug readout metrics rows use mt-4 spacing (30% reduction from mt-6)
seed_data_creation: Created mock test data with 2 drugs (Tetrodotoxin start=3, delay=0 + Acetylcholine start=6, delay=0) with per-drug settings (tetrodotoxin: hrvReadoutMinute=2, bfReadoutMinute=1, acetylcholine: hrvReadoutMinute=4, bfReadoutMinute=3). Also created 4-drug and 5-drug test scenarios to verify all colors and wraparound.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel and CSV export per-drug colors feature fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_excel_csv_per_drug_colors.py covers: Excel export API at /api/export/xlsx, CSV export API at /api/export/csv, 2/4/5 drug scenarios, per-drug settings verification, disabled drug exclusion. Excel drug_fills array colors: Drug 1=F3E8FF, Drug 2=EDE9FE, Drug 3=E9D5FF, Drug 4=DDD6FE (matching PDF DRUG_COLORS tints).

features_verified.excel_drug_fills_array: PASS - 4 PatternFill objects defined matching DRUG_COLORS
features_verified.excel_drug_perfusion_per_drug_colors: PASS - Each drug uses different fill color
features_verified.excel_drug_readout_single_header: PASS - Single 'DRUG READOUT' header with multiple drug blocks
features_verified.excel_drug_readout_per_drug_colors: PASS - Each drug block uses its index-based color
features_verified.excel_per_drug_settings: PASS - Uses correct bfReadoutMinute and hrvReadoutMinute per drug
features_verified.csv_per_drug_drug_rows: PASS - 'Drug, Tetrodotoxin' and 'Drug, Acetylcholine' rows present
features_verified.csv_per_drug_metrics: PASS - Mean BF and HRV metrics for each enabled drug
features_verified.csv_per_drug_settings: PASS - Uses correct per-drug readout minutes
features_verified.csv_disabled_drug_excluded: PASS - Disabled drug not in Drug Readout section
features_verified.color_wraparound: PASS - 5+ drugs wraps back to first color
features_verified.frontend_spacing_mt4: VERIFIED - AnalysisPanel.js uses mt-4 for drug readout metrics
